zh.Edzell, Forfarshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭安格斯艾澤爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Stirling於大約1300年出生在英國蘇格蘭安格斯艾澤爾時，他的父親John Strivelyn of Rathoran18歲，母親Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran13歲。他和Barbara Swinburne至少有2個女兒。他去世於大約1360年在他的家鄉享年62歲。

zh-hans.Edzell, Forfarshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰安格斯艾澤爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Stirling于大约1300年出生在英国苏格兰安格斯艾澤爾时，他的父亲John Strivelyn of Rathoran18岁，母亲Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran13岁。他和Barbara Swinburne至少有2个女儿。他去世于大约1360年在他的家乡享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stirling
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): habitational name from Stirling (Stirlingshire), earlier Scots Strivilin (or similar), a name of uncertain etymology. It is recorded in the 12th century as Strevelin, and is perhaps from a river name. This surname is also common in northern Ireland (Antrim and Derry).

variants.name: Sterling
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Starling, Sterling (Old English Stærling), itself from the bird-name, whose use as a nickname may also be another source of the surname. Compare Stare 2.
German: from Middle High German sterlinc, the name of a coin, hence probably a nickname for someone who paid that amount in rent.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John Stirling was born about 1300, in Edzell, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John Strivelyn of Rathoran, was 18 and his mother, Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran, was 13. He had at least 2 daughters with Barbara Swinburne. He died about 1360, in his hometown, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Stirling est né environ 1300, à Edzell, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Strivelyn of Rathoran, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran, avait 13 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Barbara Swinburne. Il est décédé environ 1360, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Stirling um 1300 in Edzell, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Strivelyn of Rathoran 18 und seine Mutter Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran 13. Er hatte mit Barbara Swinburne mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1360 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Stirling è nato il circa 1300 nel Edzell, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Strivelyn of Rathoran, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran, aveva 13 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Barbara Swinburne. Morì circa 1360, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Stirlingが約1300年にイギリススコットランドアンガスエドズエルで生まれた時，父John Strivelyn of Rathoranは18歳，母Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoranは13歳であった。彼はBarbara Swinburneとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1360年に故郷で62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Stirling(이)가 대략 1300년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 에드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Strivelyn of Rathoran(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran(은)는 13세였다. 그는 Barbara Swinburne(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1360년 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Stirling nasceu aproximadamente 1300, em Edzell, Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Strivelyn of Rathoran, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran, tinha 13 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Barbara Swinburne. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1360, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Stirling родился около 1300 г. в местности эдзелл, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Strivelyn of Rathoran было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran, 13. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Barbara Swinburne. Он умер около 1360 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет.
